---
pagetitle: "Interactive Game of Life demo"
page-layout: full
format:
  html:
    toc: false
---

```{=html}
<iframe
  src="game_of_life_demo_app.html"
  title="Interactive Conway's Game of Life demo"
  style="width: 100%; height: 1500px; border: 0; border-radius: 12px; overflow: hidden;"
  loading="lazy">
</iframe>
```
